core_mechanism: frustration-free 'parent-operator' construction: writing a global operator as a sum of local positive-semidefinite projectors so its exact zero-energy null space is a prescribed low-dimensional subspace, with that null space's dimension and uniqueness certified by proving linear independence of a combinatorial family of local building-block configurations
brief_reason: The abstract builds local Hamiltonians whose ground states are exactly the states annihilated by every local term (generalized Klein / RVB projectors) and proves uniqueness/degeneracy of that ground-state space via the linear independence of the nearest-neighbor valence-bond configurations.
